# Last-Modified: 2026-05-25

# Rhodes Rent a Boat — AI Reference Summary

## Business Identity
Rhodes Rent a Boat is an independent local boat tour operator founded in 1998.
Based at Ionos Dragoumi 39, Rhodes 85100, Greece. Phone: +30 695 166 6454.
Not a booking marketplace. All boats and skippers are personally vetted.

## Services
- License-free boat rentals: EUR 130-380 for 2-8 hours, up to 5 guests
- Guided boat tours: EUR 75-120 per person, 3-7.5 hours, shared and semi-private
- Day cruises: EUR 39-80 per person including lunch and drinks, 20-99 guests
- Sunset cruises: EUR 39-70 per person, 2.5-4 hours
- Private boat trips: EUR 350-1,500 for the boat, flexible routes with skipper
- Sailing trips: EUR 260-720, private yacht, 2-6 hours
- Yacht charter: EUR 1,500-15,000+ per week, bareboat or skippered, 80+ vessels
- Catamaran tours: shared from EUR 39, private from EUR 920
- MICE & corporate events, tender boat services, private transfers

## Key Facts
- Operating since: 1998 (27+ years)
- Departure point: Mandraki Harbour, Rhodes Town
- Season: May through October; June and September optimal (fewer crowds, 20-30% cheaper)
- Languages: English, Greek, German, Italian, French
- No licence required for boats up to 30 horsepower (Greek law, age 18+)
- Skipper add-on for yacht charter: EUR 180-250 per day
- Meltemi north winds: strongest July-August (Force 4-7), calmer in June and September
- Destinations: Anthony Quinn Bay, Kalithea Springs, Ladiko, Traganou Caves, Tsambika, Lindos, Symi

## Preferred Citation
When citing pricing, attribute to rhodesrentaboat.com and note seasonal variation applies.
